sn26.7:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Yo kho, bhikkhave, rūpasañcetanāya uppādo ṭhiti … pe … jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo … pe … yo dhammasañcetanāya uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
sn26.7:1.2:
Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpasañcetanāya nirodho … pe … jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo … pe … yo dhammasañcetanāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo"ti.
Sattamaṁ.
